reference: Masturbation does not cause thinning of hair. If thinning of hair were to be a consequence of masturbation, you could not masturbate due to an endocrine problem, specifically testosterone deficiency. So, there is no issue with masturbation.
text: Masturbation does not cause thinning of hair. If thinning of hair were to be a consequence of masturbation, you could not masturbate due to an endocrine problem, specifically testosterone deficiency. So there is no issue with masturbation.
